title: JGFE
description: Optimize the eating mechanism of food.
body: Hello, this is the Justgofxxkingeat mod. It allows you to randomly obtain one of the following four effects after eating food: 2 seconds of life recovery, 3 seconds of flame resistance, 4 seconds of movement speed increase, and 5 seconds of strength increase. In addition, it also allows you to continue eating when full and restore half of your health equivalent to the satiety of the food you have eaten.
